subject: Explore CourtAssistant project codebase
description:
Explore the CourtAssistant Android project to understand:
1. Current package structure
2. Code patterns and conventions
3. Specific issues in TextParser.kt (249 lines) and WebViewActivity.kt (677 lines)
4. Code duplication patterns (date formatting, file operations, Toast)
5. Current data access patterns
6. Core feature implementations

This exploration will inform the comprehensive refactoring architecture design.
